name: Distorted Hallways
short_description: An The Exit 8 inspired anomaly game run through the hallways of a school spotting anomalies, turn back when you spot an anomaly, and level 0 will always be safe.
detailed_description:
You are trapped in an endless school hallway. Anomalies will appear in some hallways if you see one turn back. Try to reach the exit after level 8.

See an anomaly turn back

If you don't find an anomaly keep pushing forward

There are backwards levels and forward levels each with their own set of anomalies

Level 0 is always safe

The exit is after level 8

Distorted hallways is a walking simulator anomaly game inspired by The Exit 8. The game is only available in English and Controller support will eventually come.

Play Time

10-30 minutes

Options

Only settings for Texture Quality, Foliage Quality, and Volume.
